description: BoxyHQ has been acquired into Ory, and boxyhq.com now presents Ory documentation and product pages for identity and access management. Its Polis product handles enterprise SSO federation and SCIM-based directory sync for SaaS applications.
summary: boxyhq.com currently serves Ory/Polis developer docs and exposes documented HTTP API surfaces for Ory Polis REST and Directory Sync, both authenticated with self-configured API keys; no public GraphQL API, MCP server endpoint, or CLI specific to boxyhq.com was confirmed.
